screen.sharedworld.title: Shared Worlds
screen.sharedworld.invite_copied: The share code has been copied to your clipboard.
screen.sharedworld.invite_share_line_1: Share this code with your friends.
screen.sharedworld.invite_share_line_2: It works for 7 days, or until you create a new one.
screen.sharedworld.invite_replace_confir: Press Create New Code again to replace the current code.
screen.sharedworld.invite_error_inactive: That share code is no longer active.
screen.sharedworld.delete_question_owner: Are you sure you want to delete '%s'?
screen.sharedworld.delete_detail_owner: This permanently deletes it for everyone.
screen.sharedworld.delete_question_membe: Are you sure you want to leave '%s'?
screen.sharedworld.delete_detail_member: You will need an invite code to join again.
screen.sharedworld.joining_finalizing: Previous host is safely finalizing the world...
screen.sharedworld.joining_waiting_for: Waiting for %s to start the world...
screen.sharedworld.host_change_finalizin: Previous host is safely finalizing the world...
screen.sharedworld.host_change_waiting_s: Waiting for the world to start...
screen.sharedworld.error_internet_unreac: Shared Worlds could not reach the internet. Check your connection and try again.
screen.sharedworld.error_backend_unreach: Shared Worlds could not reach the backend. Make sure it is running and try again.
screen.sharedworld.revoked_detail: You no longer have access to this Shared World.
screen.sharedworld.kicked_detail: You were removed from this Shared World.
screen.sharedworld.lifecycle_authoritati: Shared World lost backend authority for this session.
screen.sharedworld.lifecycle_obsolete_lo: Shared World discarded obsolete local state.
screen.sharedworld.lifecycle_unexpected_: Shared World hit an unexpected local invariant breach.
screen.sharedworld.no_worlds: No Shared Worlds yet. Create one or add one with a share code.
screen.sharedworld.missing_e4mc: Shared Worlds requires e4mc to be installed on this client.
screen.sharedworld.unclean_shutdown_noti: %s was not closed properly the last time it ran. The previous session may have ended unexpectedly, and progress may be up to about 5 minutes behind. Launching from this machine is the safest way to continue from the latest local state.

%s was not closed properly the last time it ran. Progress may have been lost by about 5 minutes. To minimize data loss, click Cancel and ask %s to launch the server. Otherwise, click Launch Anyway to start from the latest uploaded snapshot.
screen.sharedworld.finalization_error_de: Shared World is holding the latest staged changes safely, but finalization did not finish. You can retry on this machine.
screen.sharedworld.discard_finalization_: This will discard the previous host's stalled unfinalized changes for %s and restart from the most recent completed snapshot.
screen.sharedworld.hosting_prepare_faile: Failed to prepare Shared World hosting.
screen.sharedworld.hosting_join_target_t: e4mc did not assign a join target in time.
screen.sharedworld.hosting_lost_join_tar: Shared World lost its published join target before the backend confirmed the host session.
screen.sharedworld.hosting_confirm_timeo: Shared World couldn't confirm backend host authority in time.
screen.sharedworld.hosting_opening_to_fr: Opening the Shared World to friends...
screen.sharedworld.hosting_publish_faile: Minecraft could not publish the integrated server.
screen.sharedworld.hosting_waiting_for_e: Waiting for e4mc to publish a join target...
screen.sharedworld.hosting_lost_authorit: Shared World lost backend host authority before the host session could be confirmed.
Shared World lost backend host authority while hosting. The local host session is no longer authoritative.
Shared World lost backend host authority while publishing a snapshot. The local host session is no longer authoritative.
screen.sharedworld.validation_world_name: World name must be at least 3 characters.
screen.sharedworld.storage_google_drive_: SharedWorld uses Google Drive to store your server files. It only asks for access to the app folder, not your whole Drive.
screen.sharedworld.storage_waiting_autho: Still waiting for Google Drive authorization.
screen.sharedworld.storage_link_copied: Link copied to clipboard. Open it in your browser.
screen.sharedworld.storage_link_required: Link Google Drive before creating a Shared World.
screen.sharedworld.backups_owner_only: Only the owner can restore or delete backups.
screen.sharedworld.members_owner_only: Only the owner can remove members.
screen.sharedworld.operation_copied_shar: Copied the share code for Shared World %s.
screen.sharedworld.operation_created_sha: Created a new share code for Shared World %s.
screen.sharedworld.release_backend_autho: Shared World had to close the local session because backend authority could not be verified.
screen.sharedworld.release_resume_failed: Shared World couldn't resume finalization cleanly. %s
screen.sharedworld.release_lost_authorit: Shared World lost backend host authority before finalization could begin. The local host session was no longer authoritative.
screen.sharedworld.release_begin_finaliz: Shared World couldn't begin backend finalization cleanly. %s
screen.sharedworld.release_missing_stagi: Shared World finalization staging data is missing.
screen.sharedworld.release_upload_snapsh: Shared World couldn't upload the final snapshot cleanly. %s
screen.sharedworld.release_lost_authorit: Shared World lost backend host authority before backend finalization could complete. The local host session was no longer authoritative.
screen.sharedworld.release_complete_fina: Shared World couldn't complete backend finalization cleanly. %s
screen.sharedworld.release_persist_faile: Shared World couldn't persist release state cleanly. %s
screen.sharedworld.release_runtime_statu: Shared World runtime status is unavailable.
screen.sharedworld.release_cleared_stale: Shared World cleared stale release state from a previous session because it no longer matches the backend runtime.
screen.sharedworld.release_runtime_state: Shared World runtime reconciliation is blocked by an unexpected state mismatch.
screen.sharedworld.waiting_error_missing: Shared World waiting data was missing the next action.
The world looked ready, but no join target was available.
screen.sharedworld.waiting_error_unexpec: Shared World returned an unexpected host response while waiting.
screen.sharedworld.waiting_error_missing: Shared World waiting data was missing the waiter session.
screen.sharedworld.waiting_error_unknown: Shared World returned an unknown waiting action.
screen.sharedworld.waiting_error_invalid: Shared World returned an invalid waiting response.
